summary:
There is no documented update to the NF EN 13727 standard that specifically addresses or improves bactericidal activity assessments of skin or mucous membrane antiseptics in the presence of interfering substances. Available literature focuses on broader methodological concerns rather than revisions targeting interference-related performance evaluation.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only clinically relevant facts from the agent’s response.)
